title: litsea pallida
intro: Litsea pallida, also known as the Himalayan litsea or yellow litsea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae. Native to the Himalayas, this plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Litsea pallida include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions, such as acne and wounds. Litsea pallida is used in herbal preparations, including teas, decoctions, and infusions, as well as in traditional Ayurvedic remedies like oils and creams.
